Title: Duplicate Advisory: Kyverno is vulnerable to server-side request forgery (SSRF)
Description:
## Duplicate Advisory

This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-rggm-jjmc-3394. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
Kyverno, versions 1.16.0 and later, are vulnerable to SSRF due to unrestricted CEL HTTP functions.
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 1.16.0 up to 1.17.1
Solution: Unfortunately, there is no solution available yet.
